data.title: Chairman Rain Lõhmus joins AS LHV Group Audit Committee as fourth member until 18/09/2028, with other members remaining.
data.description: The Supervisory Board of AS LHV Group has named Rain Lõhmus, the Chairman of the Board, as the newest member of the Audit Committee starting from 18 September 2025. This appointment is valid until 18 September 2028, making him the fourth member of the committee. The current Chair and other members of the Committee will retain their positions and terms as well.

data.title: DePIN gaining traction in emerging markets like UAE and Singapore as smart money invests in decentralized technologies.
data.description: In the realm of Web2, Silicon Valley holds significant influence. However, in the adoption of DePIN technologies, emerging markets such as the UAE and Singapore are taking the lead. This is attributed to their more favorable regulatory environments and tangible infrastructure requirements. These emerging markets are actively embracing DePIN, showcasing a notable shift in the technology landscape.

data.title: Marti Technologies, Inc. will report 2025 First Half Results on September 22, 2025. Conference call/webcast at 3:30 p.m. Istanbul.
data.description: In Istanbul, Marti Technologies, Inc. (Marti) (NYSE American: MRT) will release its financial and operational data for the six months concluding on June 30, 2025, before the U.S. market opens on Monday, September 22, 2025. To review the 2025 First Half Results, there will be an analyst and investor conference call with a live webcast at 3:30 p.m. Istanbul / 1:30 p. The leading mobility super app in Turkey, Marti, will be the focus of discussion during this event.

data.title: SEALSQ CEO to keynote at IQT Quantum+AI 2025 in NYC, discussing AI and quantum cybersecurity. Panel with leading executives.
data.description: SEALSQ Corp (NASDAQ: LAES), based in Geneva, Switzerland, specializes in developing and marketing Semiconductors, PKI, and Post-Quantum technology hardware and software products. CEO Carlos Moreira is set to deliver the opening keynote at IQT Quantum + AI 2025 in New York City from October 19 to 21. The keynote, "AI Meets Quantum: Building Unbreakable Post-Quantum Security," will explore the intersection of artificial intelligence and quantum computing and their implications for cybersecurity. Alongside this, Moreira will join the CEO Roundtable discussion in Panel 8, alongside executives from Rigetti, ORCA, SEEQC, and Arqit.

data.title: Drone mapping market to reach $6.7 billion by 2035 as governments and companies embrace drones for various applications.
data.description: In today's fast-paced world, drones are becoming the go-to choice for both governments and businesses for various tasks such as real-time decision-making, land surveying, mapping, and preventive maintenance. This trend is expected to propel the market further, with significant growth anticipated. The adoption of drones is on the rise as they offer efficient solutions and value in diverse sectors. This shift indicates a promising future for the drone industry, with a remarkable surge in demand for such services.

data.title: Counsel Press Inc. acquires Firefly Legal to boost service of process market growth, based in Mokena, Illinois.
data.description: Today in New York, Counsel Press Inc., a top provider of technology-driven litigation support, revealed their recent acquisition of Firefly Legal to enhance their presence in the service of process sector. Firefly Legal, based in Mokena, Illinois, is a reputable company known for its expertise in legal procedures. This move marks a significant development for Counsel Press Inc. as they aim to expand their operations and consolidate their position in the market.

data.title: George Butler, 'Pumping Iron' filmmaker, inducted into Gold's Gym Hall of Fame at 60th anniversary event in Venice Beach, CA.
data.description: Renowned documentarian recognized at the 60th anniversary celebration of Gold's Gym for his significant influence on the bodybuilding and fitness community in Venice Beach, California on September 18, 2025. Gold's Gym, a well-known fitness brand recognized for its history in strength and performance training, honored George for his contributions.

data.title: Bubble names Leighton Meester first Global Ambassador for its "Radical Joy" campaign. Redefining clinical skincare.
data.description: Bubble has introduced its first 360 campaign titled "Radical Joy," which showcases the efficacy of playful, clinically-supported skincare products. The brand, based in New York, revealed this campaign on September 18, 2025. Bubble is known for its unique approach to clinical skincare, and it has enlisted actress Leighton Meester to be part of the campaign.

data.title: Leverage ChatGPT for crypto trading signals in real-time, including market analysis and strategy with AI. #trading #AI
data.description: Utilizing ChatGPT as a supportive companion can greatly benefit traders in their decision-making process. Through leveraging AI technology, traders can access advanced market analysis tools, interpret sentiment signals, and develop effective trading strategies. By incorporating ChatGPT into their trading routine, traders can access a wealth of information and insights to enhance their trading performance.

data.title: T-Mobile raises quarterly dividend by 16% to $1.02 per share, payable on Dec 11, 2025 to stockholders of record on Nov 26.
data.description: In Bellevue, Washington, T-Mobile US, Inc. (NASDAQ: TMUS) revealed that its Board of Directors has approved a cash dividend of $1.02 per share for its common stock. This represents a 16% increase from the last quarter, amounting to $0.14 more per share. The dividend is set to be disbursed on December 11, 2025, to stockholders listed on the record as of the end of business on November 26, 2025. T-Mobile US, Inc. is known for its innovative services in the telecommunications sector.
